film.title: Other People's Money
film.overview: When a corporate raider threatens a hostile takeover of a 'mom and pop' company, the patriarch of the company enlists the help of his wife's attractive daughter—who is a lawyer—to stop the takeover. However, the raider soon becomes infatuated with her, and enjoys the legal manoeuvring as he tries to win her heart.

dialogues.dialogue: I don't want this man to win.  I'm not scared.  I'm just proud.  I'm proud of the business we've built.  I'm so proud of you.
I'm not scared.  I'm just proud.  I'm proud of the business we've built.  I'm so proud of you.  And if what we are counts for nothing anymore... ...then that's their failing, not ours.
